---
title: "Jessica Kraft"
subtitle: "Postdoctoral Researcher at the University of Texas at Dallas"
image: images/headshot.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/jessicankraft/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jessicankraft

---
I am interested in understanding mechanisms underlying brain and cognitive aging. My research focuses on the relationship between aging, inflammation and bioenergetics, as well as their effects on markers of brain aging
